title: Marketplace Manager - OYO Rooms - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - OYO Rooms - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms family as a Marketplace Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
